# Apify Paid Report Starter Kits

Buyer-capped starter inputs for seven source-linked Apify report Actors. Six starters exercise public sources and deliver a buyer-facing signal; the authorized-site SEO starter is a free safe demo until the buyer confirms authorization. Every input caps event charges at $1 or less.

## Catalog

- [Technical SEO & AI Crawler Audit](https://luxslime.github.io/apify-paid-report-starter-kits/technical-seo-portfolio-regression-report/): Find indexability and AI crawler access regressions across authorized sites. Sources: Public pages, robots.txt, sitemap.xml, and llms.txt.
- [Apple Podcasts Category Benchmark](https://luxslime.github.io/apify-paid-report-starter-kits/podcast-category-network-benchmark-report/): Compare public show, category, publisher, and episode signals before a full benchmark. Sources: Apple Podcasts metadata and public RSS feeds.
- [Clinical Trials & PubMed Evidence Gap Report](https://luxslime.github.io/apify-paid-report-starter-kits/biomedical-trial-literature-evidence-report/): Compare trial records and publications to surface source-linked evidence gaps. Sources: ClinicalTrials.gov and PubMed APIs.
- [App Store Release & Review Benchmark](https://luxslime.github.io/apify-paid-report-starter-kits/app-release-category-review-benchmark-report/): Compare releases, ratings, and review samples around app release windows. Sources: Public Apple App Store and Google Play metadata.
- [npm & PyPI Dependency Risk Report](https://luxslime.github.io/apify-paid-report-starter-kits/package-portfolio-upgrade-risk-report/): Check package versions and vulnerability evidence before a portfolio report. Sources: npm, PyPI, and OSV public APIs.
- [CPSC & NHTSA Recall Portfolio Watch](https://luxslime.github.io/apify-paid-report-starter-kits/product-safety-market-action-portfolio-report/): Monitor official recall records across product and vehicle watchlists. Sources: CPSC and NHTSA public records.
- [eCFR & Federal Register Change Report](https://luxslime.github.io/apify-paid-report-starter-kits/regulatory-obligation-change-impact-report/): Track source-linked CFR sections and Federal Register notices by watchlist. Sources: eCFR and Federal Register public APIs.

## Buyer workflows

- [Podcast Media Planning Workflow](https://luxslime.github.io/apify-paid-report-starter-kits/bundles/podcast-media-planning/): Benchmark public podcast metadata first, then move from a category signal to a source-linked planning report.
- [Research & Regulatory Evidence Workflow](https://luxslime.github.io/apify-paid-report-starter-kits/bundles/research-regulatory-evidence/): Use official public sources to triage evidence gaps, recall actions, and regulatory changes without treating the output as advice.
- [Engineering & Product Operations Workflow](https://luxslime.github.io/apify-paid-report-starter-kits/bundles/engineering-product-operations/): Start with bounded audits for authorized sites, app reviews, and dependency risk before enabling portfolio reports.

## Usage and billing

- Review live Apify Store pricing before a paid run.
- Zero-row and unchanged monitor runs have zero event charge.
- Outputs are research and workflow inputs, not legal, medical, investment, procurement, safety-certification, ranking, or business-outcome advice.
